text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Summer camp begins today! I've prepared a
special training regimen aimed at improving her
concentration!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
I mean, come on. We were on the bus forever.
Lurching back and forth and back and forth the
whole time...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Uuugh... This is why I hate buses!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sweep Tosho seems unusually delicate today, so I
carry her things to her room for her and begin
planning tomorrow's training schedule.
